sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: On-foot Missions
special_mechanics.description: Player can leave helicopter and enter internal environments armed with rifle and missile launcher

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Variety
special_mechanics.description: Multiple vehicles with different handling characteristics: Mohican (speed/combat focused), Blackhawke (larger, heavier, rescue focused), Ground Assault Vehicle (GAV)

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight
special_mechanics.description: Primary control mechanic featuring helicopter-based combat with fuel depletion over time

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Urban Strike is a helicopter shoot 'em up; Wikipedia source provides gameplay description but no numerical physics parameters. Game emphasizes vehicle handling and mission-based action rather than character platforming, making traditional jump/gravity metrics inapplicable. No technical physics documentation available in provided sources.
